settings.heading: Contact EZQuest support
settings.copy: Reach out for product help, warranty questions, order support, or business inquiries when self-service is not enough.
settings.support_note: Choose the right route first, then send the details support will need so the next step is clear from the first reply.

settings.heading: Direct the right question to the right support route
settings.copy: Choose the right path for product help, warranty questions, or order-related issues without guessing where to start.

settings.title: Product and setup help
settings.copy: Get help with product questions, setup issues, and post-purchase support needs.

settings.title: Claims and warranty guidance
settings.copy: Review warranty guidance, claim expectations, and the information needed before service support begins.

settings.title: Shipping and return questions
settings.copy: Find the right path for shipping questions, returns, and order-related help.

settings.heading: Send a message with the details support will need
settings.copy: Send the details support needs so the right next step is clear from the first reply.
settings.side_copy: Include the product name, order reference, setup context, and the issue summary so the next step is clear from the first reply.
settings.success_message: Thanks for reaching out. Your message has been sent.

settings.intro_copy: Office details, business contact information, and response expectations live here when you need them.
settings.side_heading: Start with self-service when it is faster
settings.side_copy: Downloads, manuals, compatibility, and FAQ may solve the issue before a direct handoff is needed.

settings.heading: Need self-service before you reach out?
settings.copy: Move into support resources when that path is faster than waiting on a direct reply.
